title: atomwrite set subcommand output
description: Result of `atomwrite set` — modifies a single key in a structured config file (TOML/JSON) while preserving comments, key order, and formatting.

path.description: Absolute path to the config file.

config_path.description: Alias of `path` retained for backward compatibility.

key_path.description: Dotted path of the key that was set (e.g. `package.version`).

old_value.description: The previous value as a TOML/JSON string. `null` when the key did not exist.

new_value.description: The new value as a TOML/JSON string.

format.description: Source config format detected from extension.

comments_preserved.description: True when toml_edit successfully preserved comments (only meaningful for `format: toml`).

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock time for the operation in milliseconds.
